#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

typedef long long ll;

typedef pair<int, int> pii;

typedef pair<ll, ll> pll;

typedef pair<int, ll> pil;

typedef pair<ll, int> pli;

typedef pair<double, double> pdd;

#ifdef LOCAL

#define cerr cout

#else

#define cerr __cerr

#endif

#define rep(i, n) for (int i = 0; i < (n); ++i)

#define Rep(i, n) for (int i = 1; i <= (n); ++i)

#define All(x) x.begin(), x.end()

#define SZ(x) ((int)x.size())

#define pb push_back

#define mp make_pair

#define fi first

#define se second

#define PLUS(x, y) x = (x + (y)) % MOD

#define MINUS(x, y) x = (x - (y)) % MOD

#define MULTIPLY(x, y) x = (x * (y)) % MOD

#define DIVIDE(x, y) x = (x * inv(y)) % MOD

#define INVERSE(x) x = inv(x)

#define NEWLINE cout << '\n'

#define DEBUG(...) fprintf(stderr, __VA_ARGS__)

#define debug(...) fprintf(stderr, __VA_ARGS__), fflush(stderr)

#define time__(d) \
    for (auto blockTime = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now(); ; )\
    {\
        auto delta = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now() - blockTime;\
        if (delta > chrono::milliseconds(d))\
        {\
            blockTime = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\

            debug("Time To Here: %.3lf s\n", delta.count() * 1e-3);\

        }\

    }

#define INPUT_FILE freopen("in.txt", "r", stdin)

#define OUTPUT_FILE freopen("out.txt", "w", stdout)

#define FASTIO ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(0), cout.tie(0)

#define CASES int T; cin >> T; while (T--) solve()

#define MULTICASES int T; cin >> T; for (int ca = 1; ca <= T; ++ca) solve(ca)

#define TRACE(x) cerr << #x << " = " << x << endl

#define TRACEL(x, y) cerr << #x << " = " << x << ", " << #y << " = " << y << endl
